topic: Enabling runtime PM and get/put usage
q: 给设备加运行时电源管理,空闲自动断电、用时上电,probe 里怎么注册和上电?

corruptions.why: 编造的函数,无异步 get 变体,加引用上电用 pm_runtime_get_sync/resume_and_get
不存在,加引用上电用 pm_runtime_get_sync/resume_and_get

rubric: 用 dev_pm_ops + SET_RUNTIME_PM_OPS 挂回调;probe 里 pm_runtime_enable 后才能 get/put;要用硬件 pm_runtime_get_sync 上电加引用、用完 pm_runtime_put;remove 里 pm_runtime_disable
